title: salix uva-ursi
intro: Salix uva-ursi, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to North America. The medicinal properties of Salix uva-ursi are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin, a compound that has been used to treat urinary tract infections and other health issues. The health benefits of Salix uva-ursi include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections. Salix uva-ursi can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support kidney and bladder health.
